expectations.text: mentions-southeast-asia-chapters: Response explicitly mentions Indonesia, Singapore, and/or Malaysia as having chapters
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly lists Superteam Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia, Japan, and Korea under a 'For Southeast Asia' section.

expectations.text: lists-comprehensive-chapter-count: Response lists 15 or more distinct Superteam communities
expectations.evidence: Response lists all 23 communities by name in a bullet list.

expectations.text: includes-social-links: Response includes X (Twitter) or other social links for the listed chapters
expectations.evidence: Response does not include any social links for the chapters — only a link to superteam.fun homepage.
